task_completion.description: Log in to the Odoo instance at http://localhost:8069
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or an Odoo app (like Discuss or Employees) is visible, indicating a successful login with the admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Employees app and open Jennie Fletcher's record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee form view for 'Jennie Fletcher' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Interact with the Tags field on the employee record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tags field (located in the main card area at the top of the form) is clicked, showing a dropdown menu of available tags, or the agent is typing 'Trainer' into the field.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Trainer' tag to the employee
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Trainer' tag is visibly selected and appears as a pill/badge inside the Tags field on Jennie Fletcher's profile.

The record is saved, indicated by the form returning to a saved/read-only state, a 'Saved' status indicator, or the manual clicking of a Save icon (cloud with an arrow or similar in Odoo 17), with the 'Trainer' tag still visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within a web browser (e.g., Chromium) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to update the record.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, ensuring the tag was added through the actual Odoo application interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show `psql` commands or python scripts being executed to modify the `hr_employee` table directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 Community Edition is running at http://localhost:8069. The target employee is 'Jennie Fletcher' and the tag to add is 'Trainer'. CRITICAL NOTE: The task description asks to add the tag to her 'HR settings'. In Odoo 17, the Tags field is actually located in the main employee card area at the top of the form view, ABOVE the tabs, not inside the 'HR Settings' tab. The agent must place the 'Trainer' tag in this main Tags field. Do not penalize the agent for not finding a Tags field inside the 'HR Settings' tab, as it does not exist there.
